steps.title: Connect idea and evidence
steps.content: Lawson rejected industrialization, and the Ashbourne editions used handmade materials and intricate ornamentation reminiscent of medieval manuscripts. Those handcrafted elements display the anti-industrial values the historians identify.

steps.title: Choose the displayed meaning
steps.content: A suggests being unaware of or insensitive to something, C means examined by, and D means made more difficult or complex by. The phrase needed here means clearly shown in. The answer is B.
